# Docs coverage allowlist
# =======================
# Symbol names listed here are exempt from the docs-coverage CI gate
# (the `Docs coverage canary` step inside .github/workflows/pr.yml's
# `validate` job — driver script lives at
# .github/scripts/ci/docs-coverage.sh). Each entry is a one-line
# escape hatch — only use it when the symbol is intentionally
# exported from src/Scrapers/Pipeline/ but not part of the
# user-facing mkdocs guide under docs/.
#
# Format
# ------
#   # Reason: <why this symbol is exported but does not belong in docs/>
#   <SymbolName>
#
# Rules
# -----
#   * One symbol per line, no leading/trailing whitespace.
#   * `# …` lines are comments; blank lines are ignored.
#   * The script does whole-word matching — case-sensitive.
#   * Re-exports via barrel files (`export { Foo } from './bar.js'`)
#     are NOT scanned, so they never need allowlisting.
#   * Default exports (`export default …`) are NOT scanned for the
#     same reason — there is no symbol name to grep against docs/.
#
# When NOT to add an entry
# ------------------------
#   * If the symbol is part of the public API and a consumer might
#     reach for it from their own code → document it in docs/
#     instead. The allowlist is for genuinely-internal-but-leaked
#     names, not a way to skip documentation work.
#   * If you're mid-refactor and the symbol will be removed in the
#     same PR → drop the `export` keyword now and let the next
#     incremental commit do the cleanup; the allowlist is meant to
#     persist, not absorb in-flight churn.
#
# Maintenance
# -----------
# Review this file at least once per release. Symbols that have
# since been deleted, renamed, or properly documented should be
# removed so the allowlist does not accumulate dead entries.

# --- Phase 5: ScrapeAutoMapper cluster shared internals (PR #277) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) ScrapeAutoMapper.ts
# into AutoMapperFacade/AutoMapperTypes.ts as part of the 11-sub-module
# split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS — shared types + constants
# used by BfsFieldSearch, AccountExtractor, ContainerPicker, TxnMapper,
# etc. — not part of the user-facing @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers
# public surface. They are not re-exported from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}.

# Reason: ApiRecord — internal alias `Record<string, unknown>` for API response shapes (used by AccountExtractor + BfsFieldSearch + TxnMapper). Not a stable public type.
ApiRecord
# Reason: DEFAULT_CURRENCY — internal 'ILS' fallback constant for amount normalization; bundled into transaction objects via the shim, never imported by consumers.
DEFAULT_CURRENCY
# Reason: MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH — internal BFS recursion bound for AccountExtractor field discovery; tuning constant, not user-facing.
MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH
# Reason: ScalarFieldHit — internal helper union (`string | number | false`) for findFieldValue / coerce* miss-marking. Implementation detail of the field-search algorithm.
ScalarFieldHit
# Reason: UntypedValue — internal alias of the shared JsonValue union (named to avoid Sonar S6564); retained for call-site stability across Scrape sub-modules.
UntypedValue

# --- Phase 6: PiiRedactor cluster internal scaffolding (PR #278) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) PiiRedactor.ts
# into per-category sub-modules under Pipeline/Types/PiiRedactor/ as
# part of the 13-sub-module split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS
# — the per-strategy classify/redact registry contract, brand types,
# sentinel constants, and helpers consumed only by Facade.ts and the
# per-category siblings. Not part of the user-facing
# @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface and not re-exported
# from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}. (The user-facing `redact()` entry point
# is documented in docs/ and so is NOT in this allowlist.)

# Reason: CATEGORY — each strategy module's PiiCategory literal, consumed by Facade STRATEGY_REGISTRY dispatch. Not user-facing — consumers use the unified `redact()` entry point.
CATEGORY
# Reason: JSON_BODY_CATEGORY — JsonBody.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for the JSON walker.
JSON_BODY_CATEGORY
# Reason: URL_CATEGORY — Url.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for URL redaction.
URL_CATEGORY
# Reason: ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY — ErrorLog.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for error/log message redaction.
ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY
# Reason: TOKEN_CATEGORY — AuthCredentials.ts category literal for bearer-token classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
TOKEN_CATEGORY
# Reason: OTP_CATEGORY — AuthCredentials.ts category literal for one-time-password classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
OTP_CATEGORY
# Reason: COOKIE_CATEGORY — AuthCredentials.ts category literal for cookie/setCookie classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
COOKIE_CATEGORY
# Reason: PiiCategory — branded union type of all classifier outcomes; consumed only by Facade dispatch and the per-category modules' classify() return type.
PiiCategory
# Reason: PiiClassifierBool — Brand<boolean> tag for per-strategy classify() return values; type-system-only, no runtime surface.
PiiClassifierBool
# Reason: PiiCountInt — Brand<number> tag for counted-thing redaction outputs (e.g., name length class); type-system-only.
PiiCountInt
# Reason: PiiHintString — Brand<string> tag for redaction-output strings; type-system-only, never imported by consumers (they see plain string).
PiiHintString
# Reason: JsonValue — recursive JSON union consumed by JsonBody walker + Facade dispatch; identical to the prior internal alias on the pre-split PiiRedactor.ts.
JsonValue
# Reason: JsonScalar — JSON leaf-type alias (string|number|boolean|null); component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody.
JsonScalar
# Reason: JsonArray — readonly JsonValue[] alias; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
JsonArray
# Reason: IJsonObject — `{readonly [k:string]: JsonValue}` shape; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
IJsonObject
# Reason: REDACTED_HINT — `[REDACTED]` literal sentinel returned by default-deny; held in Types.ts so every per-category module can import it without a Facade dependency cycle.
REDACTED_HINT
# Reason: REDACTION_ERROR_HINT — `[REDACTION_ERROR]` literal sentinel returned by the unified `redact()` catch block; same anti-cycle reason as REDACTED_HINT.
REDACTION_ERROR_HINT
# Reason: OTP_HINT — `[OTP]` literal sentinel returned by the OTP strategy; held in Types.ts so per-category modules + AuthCredentials.ts import the constant instead of hardcoding the literal (CR cycle-1 #9 / §13 sentinel ban).
OTP_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT — `-***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for negative magnitudes; held in Types.ts so log readers / fixtures / test snapshots share one definition (CR cycle-2 / §13 broadened sentinel ban).
AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT — `+***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for positive magnitudes; same reason as AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT.
AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT
# Reason: isPiiRedactionDisabled — boolean flag derived from PII_REDACTION env var; consumed by per-category modules to honor the bypass (credentials excluded).
isPiiRedactionDisabled
# Reason: CensorFn — internal type alias for the Pino censor callback shape; consumed by createCensorFn + Pino logger config wiring.
CensorFn
# Reason: CensorValue — internal type for the value-position argument Pino passes into the censor function; component of CensorFn.
CensorValue
# Reason: classifyKey — key-tail-to-category lookup used internally by createCensorFn to drive PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY dispatch; not invoked by user code.
classifyKey
# Reason: createCensorFn — factory that builds the Pino censor callback from the strategy registry; wired by the Pipeline logger config, never called from user code.
createCensorFn
# Reason: PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY — Pino payload key-tail to PiiCategory mapping table; static dispatch data for createCensorFn.
PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY
# Reason: looksLikeToken — AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for bearer-token-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeToken
# Reason: looksLikeOtp — AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for one-time-password-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeOtp
# Reason: looksLikeCookie — AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for cookie/setCookie-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeCookie
# Reason: PII_QUERY_KEYS — Url.ts list of query-string parameter names that must be redacted; static dispatch data for URL redaction.
PII_QUERY_KEYS
# Reason: SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS — ErrorLog.ts allowlist of ScraperErrorTypes enum values that must never be log-interpolated (CodeQL #28); static dispatch data for redactSensitiveEnum.
SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS
# Reason: buildSegmenter — CommonHelpers.ts factory returning a Unicode Intl.Segmenter for accurate grapheme counting; used by length-class hints in Name/Merchant.
buildSegmenter
# Reason: graphemeCount — CommonHelpers.ts grapheme-cluster counter built on buildSegmenter; consumed only by per-category length-class hint logic.
graphemeCount

# --- Phase 6 follow-up: CR review #5 shared-table extract (PR #278) ---
# Reason: LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS — CommonHelpers.ts regex table shared by JsonBody.applyFallbackPatterns AND Html.redactHtml; extracted from the two former duplicate constants per CR review finding #5 (DRY / no-duplication guideline).
LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS

# --- Phase 8.5a / Network canonical-10 drain (PR pending) ---
# All entries below are internal helpers exposed by the focused sub-modules
# under Mediator/Network/Fetch/ and Mediator/Network/AuthDiscovery/. They
# are composed by their parent module (and consumed by the legacy shim's
# re-export) and intentionally NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.
# The barrel (index.ts) re-exports only the historical public surface.

# Reason: getJsonHeaders — Fetch/Headers.ts JSON Content-Type/Accept builder; composed inside fetchPost/fetchGet to keep the parent functions <=10 LoC.
getJsonHeaders
# Reason: LogEmitted — Fetch/Logging.ts Brand<true> tag for log-emit functions; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15 (no exported primitive returns).
LogEmitted
# Reason: logApiCall — Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost; centralizes the request-start LOG.info shape.
logApiCall
# Reason: logResponseIssues — Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by parseGetResult/parsePostResult; centralizes the response-anomaly LOG.warn shape.
logResponseIssues
# Reason: IFetchGraphqlOptions — Fetch/NativeFetch.ts option-bag interface for fetchGraphql; shared between the native call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchGraphqlOptions
# Reason: fetchGraphql — Fetch/NativeFetch.ts thin wrapper over fetchPost with GraphQL Content-Type defaults; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
fetchGraphql
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPage — Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts page-context evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchGetWithinPage
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders — Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts variant of fetchGetWithinPage with explicit request headers; re-exported for historical callers.
fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders
# Reason: IFetchPostOptions — Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts option-bag interface for fetchPostWithinPage; shared between the page-eval call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchPostOptions
# Reason: fetchPostWithinPage — Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts page-context POST evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchPostWithinPage
# Reason: EMPTY_RESULT — Fetch/ParseResult.ts sentinel literal returned by parseGetResult/parsePostResult on empty bodies; centralized to avoid sentinel duplication across sub-modules.
EMPTY_RESULT
# Reason: IParseErrorOpts — Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for handleParseError; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
IParseErrorOpts
# Reason: IParseGetOpts — Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parseGetResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchGet sub-modules.
IParseGetOpts
# Reason: IParsePostOpts — Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parsePostResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost sub-modules.
IParsePostOpts
# Reason: handleParseError — Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared catch-block helper that emits LOG.warn + returns EMPTY_RESULT; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
handleParseError
# Reason: parseGetResult — Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for GET-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.parseFetchGetResponse + PageFetchGet.evaluateGet.
parseGetResult
# Reason: parsePostResult — Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for POST-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.fetchPost + PageFetchPost.runPostEvaluate.
parsePostResult
# Reason: WafBlockDescription — Fetch/WafDetection.ts Brand<string> tag for WAF detection results; type-system-only, consumed only by WafBlockError construction.
WafBlockDescription
# Reason: detectWafBlock — Fetch/WafDetection.ts shared detector invoked by fetchPost + fetchGet to short-circuit response parsing on WAF interception; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
detectWafBlock
# Reason: extractAuthHeader — AuthDiscovery/HeadersTier.ts per-endpoint header-extraction helper; composed by Tier 1 (discoverFromHeaders).
extractAuthHeader
# Reason: searchBodyForToken — AuthDiscovery/ResponseTier.ts response-body walker that finds WellKnown token fields (flat + 1 level nested); composed by Tier 2 (discoverFromResponses).
searchBodyForToken
# Reason: readMainStorageRaw — AuthDiscovery/StorageMain.ts raw sessionStorage reader for the main page frame; composed by Tier 3a (discoverFromStorage).
readMainStorageRaw
# Reason: readAllJsonStorageValues — AuthDiscovery/StorageScanAll.ts JSON-shape filter over sessionStorage keys in a single frame; composed by Tier 3c (discoverFromAllStorageKeys).
readAllJsonStorageValues
# Reason: checkOneValue — AuthDiscovery/StorageFrames.ts single-value token extractor with JSON-then-raw fallback; composed by Tier 3b (discoverFromAllFrames).
checkOneValue
# Reason: handleToToken — AuthDiscovery/PollTier.ts Playwright JSHandle-to-token resolver; composed by Tier 4 (pollForAuthModule).
handleToToken
# Reason: TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown auth-body field-name table; static dispatch data shared by ResponseTier search logic.
TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS
# Reason: STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown sessionStorage key-name table; static dispatch data shared by StorageMain + StorageFrames.
STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling timeout constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling interval constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL
# Reason: IStorageAuth — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts parsed JSON-storage auth shape; consumed by extractFromParsed in tryParseJsonToken.
IStorageAuth
# Reason: PrefixedAuthToken — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts Brand<string> tag for prefixToken's return type; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
PrefixedAuthToken
# Reason: prefixToken — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts auth-scheme prefix helper (CALAuthScheme/Bearer); composed by ResponseTier + StorageFrames.
prefixToken
# Reason: tryParseJsonToken — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts safe JSON-parse-and-extract for sessionStorage-stored auth blobs; composed by StorageMain + StorageFrames + StorageScanAll + PollTier.
tryParseJsonToken

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 2 follow-up (AuthDiscovery tier helpers) ---
# Tier orchestrator helpers introduced by the AuthDiscovery sub-module split.
# Each is composed by the wider discoverAuthThreeTier orchestrator and is
# NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.

# Reason: discoverFromHeaders — AuthDiscovery/HeadersTier.ts Tier 1 wrapper that scans captured endpoints for an Authorization-shaped request header; composed by Orchestrator.fallbackTiers.
discoverFromHeaders
# Reason: discoverFromResponses — AuthDiscovery/ResponseTier.ts Tier 2 wrapper that walks WK-auth response bodies for a token field; composed by Orchestrator as the first attempted tier.
discoverFromResponses
# Reason: discoverFromStorage — AuthDiscovery/StorageMain.ts Tier 3a wrapper that reads the main-page sessionStorage for an auth blob; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromStorage
# Reason: discoverFromAllFrames — AuthDiscovery/StorageFrames.ts Tier 3b wrapper that scans every iframe sessionStorage for an auth blob; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromAllFrames
# Reason: discoverFromAllStorageKeys — AuthDiscovery/StorageScanAll.ts Tier 3c wrapper that scans every sessionStorage key in every frame for token-shaped JSON; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromAllStorageKeys
# Reason: pollForAuthModule — AuthDiscovery/PollTier.ts Tier 4 wrapper that polls every frame's sessionStorage for auth-module until it appears; composed by Orchestrator.fallbackTiers as the last-resort tier.
pollForAuthModule
# Reason: AUTH_HEADER_NAMES — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown auth request-header name table (authorization, x-auth-token); static dispatch data shared by HeadersTier.
AUTH_HEADER_NAMES
# Reason: AUTH_MODULE_STORAGE_KEY — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown sessionStorage key name for the canonical auth blob; static dispatch data shared by PollTier (closure-captured via waitForFunction arg, see CR PR #280 #111).
AUTH_MODULE_STORAGE_KEY

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 3 (AuthFailureWatcher split) ---
# All entries below are internal helpers exposed by the focused sub-modules
# under Mediator/Network/AuthFailureWatcher/. They are composed by the
# Factory's createAuthFailureWatcher/createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher entry
# points and intentionally NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.

# Reason: BODY_PREVIEW_LIMIT — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts mask-truncate length for diagnostic body previews; shared by BodyReaders + Inspector.
BODY_PREVIEW_LIMIT
# Reason: FAIL_STATUS_MIN — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts inclusive lower bound of the 4xx auth-rejection range; static dispatch data for UrlMatchers.
FAIL_STATUS_MIN
# Reason: FAIL_STATUS_MAX — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts inclusive upper bound of the 4xx auth-rejection range; static dispatch data for UrlMatchers.
FAIL_STATUS_MAX
# Reason: NO_PARSED_BODY — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts sentinel string returned by BodyReaders.safeParsedBody when JSON parse fails; composed by Inspector.
NO_PARSED_BODY
# Reason: IWatcherState — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts mutable internal-state shape passed between Factory, Inspector, Waiter, State sub-modules.
IWatcherState
# Reason: matchInRecord — AuthFailureWatcher/BodyClassifier.ts (file-private since CR PR #280 #118); kept for historical trace — the symbol is no longer exported and this row is therefore inert.
matchInRecord
# Reason: safeBodyPreview — AuthFailureWatcher/BodyReaders.ts safe response.text() + mask + truncate helper; composed by Inspector + Waiter for diagnostic previews.
safeBodyPreview
# Reason: safeParsedBody — AuthFailureWatcher/BodyReaders.ts safe response.text() + JSON.parse helper; composed by Inspector for L2 (body-error) detection.
safeParsedBody
# Reason: RecordOutcome — AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts Brand<boolean> tag for recordFailure's return; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
RecordOutcome
# Reason: recordFailure — AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts idempotent state-mutator + LOG.debug emitter; composed by Inspector (both layers) + Waiter.
recordFailure
# Reason: readDetected — AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts cross-await re-read of state.detected (defeats TS narrowing); composed by Waiter.awaitFailure.
readDetected
# Reason: DisposedFlag — AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts Brand<boolean> tag for readDisposed's return; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15 (CR PR #280 #121 follow-up).
DisposedFlag
# Reason: readDisposed — AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts cross-await re-read of state.isDisposed (defeats TS narrowing); composed by Waiter.executeAwait (CR PR #280 #121 follow-up).
readDisposed
# Reason: inspectAuthResponse — AuthFailureWatcher/Inspector.ts two-layer detection runner; composed by buildResponseHandler.
inspectAuthResponse
# Reason: buildResponseHandler — AuthFailureWatcher/Inspector.ts factory returning the Playwright response listener closure; composed by Factory.createAuthFailureWatcher.
buildResponseHandler
# Reason: buildWatcherApi — AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts builder that returns the IAuthFailureWatcher public object bound to a page + state; composed by both createAuthFailureWatcher and tests.
buildWatcherApi
# Reason: AuthMatcherBool — AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts Brand<boolean> tag for isAuthEndpointUrl + isFailureStatusCode return types; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
AuthMatcherBool

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 4 follow-up (AuthFailureWatcher public-surface paths) ---
# These symbols existed in BASE's monolithic Mediator/Network/AuthFailureWatcher.ts
# and constitute the public AuthFailureWatcher API. Phase 8.5a/commit 3 moved
# them into focused sub-modules under .../AuthFailureWatcher/. The docs-coverage
# gate diffs per-file, so the new file paths look "newly introduced" even though
# the symbol names are unchanged. Allowlisted because the public API surface is
# identical; no new exports were added.

# Reason: classifyBodyAsFailure — AuthFailureWatcher/BodyClassifier.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public body-pattern matcher; reused by L2 inspection.
classifyBodyAsFailure
# Reason: createAuthFailureWatcher — AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) primary entry point; used by DiscoveryEngine.buildIoSlice.
createAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher — AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) frozen-replay variant; used by FrozenReplay.buildBaseFrozenDiscovery.
createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: AuthFailureClassifier — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) classifier-function type alias; consumed externally.
AuthFailureClassifier
# Reason: IAuthFailure — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) failure-payload interface returned to callers.
IAuthFailure
# Reason: IAuthFailureWatcher — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) primary watcher contract returned by the Factory.
IAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: IBodyFailurePattern — AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) body-pattern shape used by AUTH_BODY_FAILURE_PATTERNS table.
IBodyFailurePattern
# Reason: isAuthEndpointUrl — AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public URL-pattern predicate; reused by inspection helpers.
isAuthEndpointUrl
# Reason: isFailureStatusCode — AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public 4xx status predicate; reused by inspection helpers.
isFailureStatusCode
# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 7 (Network §11 cap tightening 20→10) ---
# Reason: IAwaitFailureArgs — AuthFailureWatcher/Waiter.ts bundled-args interface introduced solely to keep awaitFailure within the 10-LoC per-function cap; internal-only — no external consumer.
IAwaitFailureArgs

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 9 (CR PR #280 follow-up — Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs export surface) ---
# Reason: logShapeAwarePick — Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs.ts canonical `discover.shapeAware` Pino emitter; composed by every ShapeAware caller so the structured event lives in one place.
logShapeAwarePick
# Reason: ShapeAwareTier — Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs.ts type alias enumerating the seven shape-aware tier labels carried on `discover.shapeAware`; consumed by callers to type-check tier arguments.
ShapeAwareTier
# Reason: NETWORK_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS — Network/FetchConfig.ts AbortController-driven native-fetch timeout (30s); shared by Fetch/NativeFetch.ts so bank API stalls cannot hang the scraper indefinitely (CR PR #280 #124).
NETWORK_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS

# --- Phase 8.5b / commit 3 (ScrapeReplay split) ---
# Reason: JsonRecord — ScrapeReplay/JsonTypes.ts canonical Record<string, JsonNode> alias used across every ScrapeReplay/* sub-module + Strategy/Scrape/ScrapeDataActions+ScrapeChunking+Account/AccountScrapeStrategy consumers; previously exported via "export type { JsonRecord }" from ScrapeReplayAction.ts (docs-coverage regex only matches direct "export type" declarations so the symbol is now flagged, but its public-surface status is unchanged).
JsonRecord

# --- Phase 3 / commit 13 (CR PR #286 finding F7 — OTP click timeouts) ---
# Reason: OTP_FALLBACK_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS — Mediator/Otp/OtpDetectorConfig.ts named constant (5000 ms) used exclusively by OtpDetector.tryFallbackClick and its unit-test suite. Extracted from an inline literal per CR PR #286 to keep the fallback + force-click timeouts together and prevent drift; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
OTP_FALLBACK_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS
# Reason: OTP_FORCE_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS — Mediator/Otp/OtpDetectorConfig.ts named constant (3000 ms) used exclusively by OtpDetector.tryForceClick and its unit-test suite. Extracted from an inline literal per CR PR #286 to keep the fallback + force-click timeouts together and prevent drift; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
OTP_FORCE_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS

# --- Phase 2a / C15 (PipelineContextSlotKeys — extracted from PipelineContextFactory.ts) ---
# Reason: PhaseStateSlotKey — internal string-literal union 'login' | 'dashboard' | 'scrape' | 'api' used by PipelineContextFactory.ts to type the four top-level phase-state result slots. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
PhaseStateSlotKey
# Reason: DiscoverySlotKey — internal string-literal union of the six discovery result-slot names (preLoginDiscovery, loginFieldDiscovery, scrapeDiscovery, accountDiscovery, txnEndpoint, dashboardTxnHarvest) used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
DiscoverySlotKey
# Reason: PhaseEmitSlotKey — internal string-literal union 'authDiscovery' | 'otpTrigger' | 'otpFill' for the M1/M4 sealed-phase result slots used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
PhaseEmitSlotKey
# Reason: BalanceSlotKey — internal string-literal union of the five balance-pipeline result-slot names (balanceFetchPlan, balanceResponsesByBankAccount, balanceExtracted, balanceValidation, balanceResolution) used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
BalanceSlotKey
# Reason: ResultSlotKey — internal union-of-the-four-sub-key-types fed to Pick<IPipelineContext, ResultSlotKey> to derive IResultSlots inside PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
ResultSlotKey

# --- Phase 2c-strict / Dashboard split (DashboardPhaseActions / TxnParser) ---
# Reason: IDashboardTargets — internal target-resolver bundle used by DashboardPhaseActions.sequential.ts + .targets.ts + .action.ts siblings after the 1991-line monolith was split to satisfy the 150-line file cap. Pure cross-sibling type plumbing; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IDashboardTargets
# Reason: JsonScopeValue — internal JSON-value alias used by the TxnParser.scope.ts / .accountId.ts / .harvest.ts siblings after TxnParser.ts was split to satisfy the per-file LoC budget. Same architectural role as TxnParser.ts (DASHBOARD-side harvest scope); pure cross-sibling type plumbing, not part of the public API.
JsonScopeValue

# --- Phase 2d-strict / Login cycle break (LoginFieldDiscovery <-> LoginSubmitResolve) ---
# Reason: IDiscoverFieldsArgs — internal bundled-arguments interface shared by LoginFieldDiscovery.ts (producer of executeDiscoverFields) and LoginSubmitResolve.ts (consumer of resolveSubmitTarget). Extracted to LoginFieldDiscovery.types.ts to break the type-only madge cycle introduced by the Phase 2d split (LoginFieldDiscovery imports resolveSubmitTarget at runtime while LoginSubmitResolve imported the type back). Pure cross-sibling type plumbing; not part of the public API surface.
IDiscoverFieldsArgs

# --- Phase 2 / CR fix (EndpointUrlHelpers — WK constant for pending/clearance-requests URL) ---
# Reason: PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_PENDING — internal WellKnown registry constant in ScrapeWK.ts that names the apiPrefix/pathFragment/actionName triple for the pending/clearance-requests endpoint on the shared card-family backbone (CAL/Isracard/Amex/MAX). Mirrors the shape of pre-existing PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_BILLING/_API/_QUERY_KEYS/_HEADERS constants which were grandfathered into the docs-coverage gate by pre-existing on main; this addition is the same kind (Pipeline-internal WK registry plumbing consumed only by EndpointUrlHelpers.resolvePendingUrl). Not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface — Pipeline is internal to the scrapers, not exported via src/index.ts.
PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_PENDING

# Reason: Internal probe-result interface for urlHasWkDateRange (Rule #15
#         object-typed return). Used only inside AccountScrapeStrategy.
IUrlWkProbe

# Reason: Internal predicate used only by AccountScrapeStrategy to detect
#         whether a captured TXN endpoint URL carries WK date-range params.
urlHasWkDateRange

# Reason: Internal helper used only by AccountScrapeStrategy to extract
#         the captured fromDate from a TXN endpoint URL (Hapoalim preview
#         window fix).
readCapturedFromDate

# Reason: buildPinoOptions / buildSilentOptions / buildActiveOptions —
#         internal Logging/RootLogger.ts helpers exported ONLY so unit
#         tests under Tests/Unit/Pipeline/Logging/RootLogger.test.ts
#         can pin the silent vs active dispatch contract introduced
#         by CR PR #337 finding 2 (pino-v10 STDOUT fallthrough closure).
#         Not consumed by production code outside the module; no
#         user-facing API surface.
buildPinoOptions
buildSilentOptions
buildActiveOptions

# --- Phase 12b: Mediator/Timing split (PR TBD) ---
# These 69 timing-budget constants were previously declared in
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Mediator/Timing/TimingConfig.ts and are NOT new
# public API. Phase 12b decomposed that 481-LoC hub into 13 per-phase
# domain files (HomeTimingConfig.ts, OtpTimingConfig.ts, etc.) plus a
# shared cross-cutting module. The original TimingConfig.ts now re-exports
# every name verbatim via export * from for one release window, so the
# external symbol surface emitted into lib/index.{cjs,mjs} is unchanged
# (lib/index.d.ts hash byte-identical: 14819 bytes).
#
# The docs-coverage scanner cannot distinguish "moved to a new file"
# from "newly introduced" via export * from barrels, so it sees every
# constant as + ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_BUDGET_MS (introduced in
# .../AccountResolveTimingConfig.ts) and demands docs coverage. These
# names were never user-facing in the first place — they are
# Pipeline-internal wait-budget ceilings consumed by the phase mediator,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
# Allowlisting them keeps the perimeter honest without forcing 69 entries
# into docs/ for symbols that are scheduled for further consolidation in
# v8.6 alongside the barrel removal.
ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_BUDGET_MS
ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_POLL_MS
AUTH_DISCOVERY_DASHBOARD_WAIT_MS
AUTH_DISCOVERY_FINAL_SETTLE_MS
AUTH_DISCOVERY_PRE_SETTLE_MS
AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS
DASHBOARD_CHANGE_PWD_TIMEOUT_MS
DASHBOARD_DATE_FILTER_TIMEOUT_MS
DASHBOARD_FINAL_TXN_WAIT_MS
DASHBOARD_MENU_SETTLE_MS
DASHBOARD_ORGANIC_IDLE_MS
DASHBOARD_POST_MATCH_TXN_WAIT_MS
DASHBOARD_PRELUDE_TIMEOUT_MS
DASHBOARD_REVEAL_TIMEOUT_MS
DASHBOARD_SETTLE_MS
DASHBOARD_SUCCESS_TIMEOUT_MS
DASHBOARD_TRIGGER_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS
DASHBOARD_TRIGGER_RENDER_TIMEOUT_MS
DEFAULT_OTP_TIMEOUT_MS
DEFAULT_WAIT_INTERVAL_MS
DEFAULT_WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS
ELEMENTS_CLICK_RACE_TIMEOUT_MS
ELEMENTS_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS
ELEMENTS_DOM_READY_TIMEOUT_MS
ELEMENTS_EVALUATE_TIMEOUT_MS
ELEMENTS_FORENSICS_EVAL_TIMEOUT_MS
ELEMENTS_LOADING_DELAY_MS
ELEMENTS_NETWORK_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS
ELEMENTS_URL_WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS
HOME_ENTRY_TIMEOUT_MS
HOME_FORM_READY_TIMEOUT_MS
HOME_MODAL_SETTLE_TIMEOUT_MS
HOME_PRELUDE_TIMEOUT_MS
HOME_RESOLVER_ENTRY_TIMEOUT_MS
HOME_SETTLE_TIMEOUT_MS
HOME_SPA_NAV_TIMEOUT_MS
HUMAN_DELAY_MAX_MS
HUMAN_DELAY_MIN_MS
INIT_DOM_READY_TIMEOUT_MS
INIT_NAV_COMMIT_TIMEOUT_MS
LOGIN_COOKIE_AUDIT_NETWORK_IDLE_MS
LOGIN_PER_FRAME_SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS
LOGIN_POST_SUBMIT_SETTLE_TIMEOUT_MS
LOGIN_PRELUDE_POST_TIMEOUT_MS
LOGIN_TRAFFIC_WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS
NETWORK_POST_INTERCEPT_TIMEOUT_MS
NETWORK_WAIT_FIRST_ID_POLL_MS
OTP_ERROR_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS
OTP_FILL_PRELUDE_TIMEOUT_MS
OTP_FORM_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS
OTP_PHASE_SETTLE_TIMEOUT_MS
OTP_RETRIEVER_SETTLE_MS
OTP_SUBMIT_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS
OTP_TRIGGER_GONE_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS
OTP_TRIGGER_PRELUDE_TIMEOUT_MS
PHASE_SETTLE_MS
PRELOGIN_CRED_AREA_TIMEOUT_MS
PRELOGIN_DISCOVER_TIMEOUT_MS
PRELOGIN_FORM_GATE_TIMEOUT_MS
PRELOGIN_FORM_POST_TIMEOUT_MS
PRELOGIN_FORM_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS
PRELOGIN_RESOLVE_TARGET_TIMEOUT_MS
PRELOGIN_REVEAL_NAV_TIMEOUT_MS
PRELUDE_NONE_BUDGET_MS
SCRAPE_UI_TRAFFIC_TIMEOUT_MS
SCRAPE_UI_WK_TIMEOUT_MS
SECOND
STRONG_AUTH_COOKIE_FLOOR
TERMINATE_CLEANUP_BUDGET_MS

# --- Phase 12b: BasePhase helper extraction (PR TBD) ---
# These 12 symbols were previously module-private helpers + brand types
# defined inside src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Types/BasePhase.ts. Phase 12b
# sub-step 3/4 hoisted them into four sibling files under
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Phases/Base/ (PhaseTrace.ts,
# BalanceContextSlice.ts, ActionContextBuilder.ts, HandoffHelpers.ts).
# They are NOT new public
# API — they remain Pipeline-internal collaborators of the abstract
# BasePhase Template Method; lib/index.d.ts SHA-256 stays
# byte-identical after the move. The docs-coverage scanner sees them
# as "newly introduced" because it can't follow same-PR cross-file
# moves. These names were never user-facing; the public surface is the
# `BasePhase` class and the `IsPrePayloadValid` brand re-exported from
# Types/BasePhase.ts.
TraceTagStr
PHASE_STAGE_EVENT
RESULT_TAG
traceTag
BALANCE_SLOT_KEYS
BalanceContextSlice
balanceContextSlice
buildBootstrapContext
extractExecutor
buildActionContext
DidEmitHandoff
logHandoffSummary

# --- Phase 12b sub-step 4/4: BasePhase class relocation (PR TBD) ---
# `IsPrePayloadValid` is a Brand<boolean> tag the abstract `BasePhase`
# template method uses internally to confirm the PRE stage produced a
# well-formed payload before handing off to ACTION. It is exported from
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Phases/Base/BasePhase.ts so the legacy
# Types/BasePhase.ts shim can re-export it for back-compat. The brand
# is module-internal — no user-facing scraper code constructs or pattern-
# matches against it — so dedicated docs coverage would be noise. The
# user-facing concept ("BasePhase template method") is already
# documented in docs/architecture/{layers,pipeline}.md and
# docs/phases/index.md.
IsPrePayloadValid
# --- Phase 12a: CreateElementMediator god-module split (sub-step 1 — Scope + Locators) ---
# These symbols moved out of CreateElementMediator.ts into focused sub-modules
# under src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Mediator/Elements/Create/. They are CROSS-MODULE
# INTERNALS — used by the façade plus the upcoming Hittest/Entries/Race extraction
# clusters. None are part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public API
# (Pipeline is internal — public surface is src/index.ts, not the Pipeline tree).

# Reason: CLICK_RACE_TIMEOUT — internal default-timeout constant (3000 ms) for the
#         parallel resolveAndClick race; tuning knob, not a consumer-facing API.
CLICK_RACE_TIMEOUT
# Reason: NO_FORM_ANCHOR — empty-string sentinel meaning "no form scoping"; internal
#         to the SelectorCandidate→Locator dispatch, never crosses a public boundary.
NO_FORM_ANCHOR
# Reason: LocatorContext — internal type alias (Page | Frame | Locator) used by the
#         per-kind locator builders so form-scoping can be applied uniformly via
#         Locator chaining. Implementation detail of the dispatch table.
LocatorContext
# Reason: applyFormScope — helper that promotes a Page/Frame to a form-scoped
#         Locator (or returns ctx unchanged when no form anchor is set). Internal
#         to Create/Locators.ts; reused by upcoming Race/Hittest extractions.
applyFormScope
# Reason: buildCandidateLocators — internal factory producing first-match locators
#         from a SelectorCandidate for legacy resolvers (login/preLogin/OTP/scrape).
#         Used by the façade plus the next-commit Hittest/Entries sub-modules.
buildCandidateLocators
# Reason: buildCandidateLocatorsBase — internal factory producing BASE (no .first())
#         locators consumed by the multi-match nth-enumeration race path. Internal
#         counterpart of buildCandidateLocators.
buildCandidateLocatorsBase
# Reason: LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS — internal OCP dispatch table mapping each
#         SelectorCandidate.kind to its locator builder. Pure dispatch table; not
#         a public extension point.
LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS
# Reason: LocatorKindBuilder — internal function signature for entries of
#         LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS. Implementation detail of the dispatch table.
LocatorKindBuilder
# Reason: buildAriaLabelLocators — internal per-kind builder for ariaLabel
#         candidates (fans across getByLabel + 3 ARIA roles). Used only by the
#         LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS dispatch table.
buildAriaLabelLocators
# Reason: buildClickableTextLocatorsBase — internal per-kind builder for the
#         clickableText kind (innermost element containing text). Dispatch-table
#         row, not a public API.
buildClickableTextLocatorsBase
# Reason: buildCssLocators — internal per-kind builder for raw CSS candidates;
#         row in the LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS dispatch table.
buildCssLocators
# Reason: buildExactTextLocators — internal per-kind builder for exactText
#         candidates (getByText with exact:true); dispatch-table row.
buildExactTextLocators
# Reason: buildLabelTextLocators — internal per-kind builder for labelText
#         candidates (Playwright getByLabel resolves to the bound form control);
#         dispatch-table row.
buildLabelTextLocators
# Reason: buildNameLocators — internal per-kind builder for HTML 
ame
#         attribute candidates (CSS attribute selector); dispatch-table row.
buildNameLocators
# Reason: buildPlaceholderLocators — internal per-kind builder for placeholder
#         candidates (getByPlaceholder); dispatch-table row.
buildPlaceholderLocators
# Reason: buildRegexLocators — internal per-kind builder for regex candidates
#         (getByText with RegExp); dispatch-table row.
buildRegexLocators
# Reason: buildWalkUpLocatorsBase — internal per-kind builder for textContent
#         candidates (walk-up XPath across CLICK_ANCESTORS tags); dispatch-table row.
buildWalkUpLocatorsBase
# Reason: buildXpathLocators — internal per-kind builder for xpath candidates
#         (prepends xpath= and relativizes under form scope); dispatch-table row.
buildXpathLocators
